README.txt.content:
Welcome to MysteryOS.

Something went wrong with this machine.
Explore. Find the truth.

Start with the Documents folder.

From: Admin
Re: System Migration

Do NOT open the System/Archive folder.
Password has been changed to something no one would guess.
Hint: it's what comes after Z.
